name: same_supplier_34_variants_across_3_threads
expected_output: Single supplier entity: Sharma / S. Sharma & Co. Tasks: Delivery confirmed for tomorrow — packaging to be prepared.
pass_criteria: PASS: All three references resolved to single supplier entity. FAIL: Any variant creates a duplicate record.

notes: Most realistic L3 scenario — three reference styles in one day
